ModMetaData.name: LxO - Learn to Survive
ModMetaData.author: Lexxers
ModMetaData.description:
Your colonists learn from experience. Five new intelligence stats grow over time as pawns perform activities.
HAULING SENSE - Stack merging, proximity hauling, construction staging, hauler coordination WORK AWARENESS - Pre-task cleaning, ingredient gathering, task chaining, workstation loyalty PATH MEMORY - Shortcut discovery, room avoidance, danger memory, weather routing COMBAT INSTINCT - Cover seeking, friendly fire prevention, target priority, auto-retreat SELF-PRESERVATION - Food preference, table seeking, need anticipation, medicine matching
Level 0 = vanilla behavior. Each level adds one improvement. Skills never decay. Level 20 masters write books to teach other colonists.
Backstory and traits affect starting levels and learning speed.
Compatible with Pick Up And Haul, Common Sense, Combat Extended, and modded races. Safe to add mid-save. 7 languages included.
Free forever. Donations: ko-fi.com/lexxes
